productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Triple Truffle - Mochi Cake - 3.5g
description: Cannabis caviar made from Mochi Cake: dense hybrid flower hand-dipped in oil, then dusted in a glittering coat of kief for a seriously strong, special-occasion smoke. A slow-burning powerhouse, a sweet, vanilla, earthy aroma with a relaxing, euphoric feel, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
